text:
Created attachment 163399
patch for phplist update

There is new version of phplist. So I've made a patch which cover this update. I've checked it against poudriere. YOu can check log of this test on:
https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2015-11-21_23h47m07s/logs/phplist-3.2.3.log (it is self signed certificate).
